# Cacti Technologies
> Local tech agency in Grand Rapids, Michigan

## What We Do
Cacti Technologies builds websites, sets up AI automations, and fixes broken tech for small businesses in West Michigan. Founded by Carson Seeger, MBA — former Fortune 500 technology leader.

## Services
- Custom websites (starting at $300)
- AI chatbots and workflow automations
- Local SEO and Google Business optimization
- Tech rescue and system fixes ($75/hr)
- Growth retainers ($149/mo)

## Contact
- Email: carsonseeger@proton.me
- Location: Grand Rapids, Michigan
- Website: https://cactitechnologies.com

## Portfolio
- Arkova (https://arkova.ai) — Enterprise credential verification platform with Bitcoin-anchored document integrity, AI-powered extraction, and compliance dashboards. 166K+ records secured, 320K+ public records.
